title: abrus pulchellus subsp. tenuiflorus
intro: Abrus pulchellus subsp. tenuiflorus, also known as the slender Abrus pulchellus, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain abrin, a powerful toxin with analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Abrus pulchellus subsp. tenuiflorus include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used in traditional medicine to create remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, although its use requires careful handling and caution due to the presence of abrin.
